TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakaliman == sawawaan nu tatayna micidekay a imelang Ś≠źŚģģť†łÁôĆ sawawaan nu tatayna micidekay a imelang, i sawawaan namakay i la'cusay a si-paw, u saiyaway sa kaliyuhan anu pihaceng sa, tahkal ku idang adada' ku pakah. milawit tu 95 way a cidek imelang sa namakay cabay ya nikasa, siimelangay malaliday cakapihaceng, mala cidekay malalid namakay mitabaku dawmi'ay ku udip. mukanaay tu sapaiyu', katuudday ku tatama caykukakalid ku kapahay sawawaan a cidek sa iayaan nu cacay tusa abatan ku mihcaan katenes tu tahekal kaadihan sa,lasubu% pesenmasakines 10%masacacay waan amin katinengan, miliya u aca misawantan tu u micidekay haw milalid. HPV HPV . cidek a imelang nu tatayna i tahab sa sakatepat kaiyadah, u sakasepat kaiyadahan nu mapataiya' lasubu pisac 90% u pakuyuc a kanatal, mapatayai u kapah hay a kanatal sa, masikul, sisa inai' ku imelangay kingkiuwan ci Hay-li-ya-ta La-kes a tatayna akawawaan. imelang ÁóÖÁźÜ kawawaan amicidekay namakay matenesay cucuimelang pabau si-pau, la'cusay "Epithelial cell dysplasia". malamicidekay cacay sabautuenem,katil nu cucu masakatilkines sipaucidek sabaw walu sin malalid malaulic cidekay katinenga isiy, iya sabaw eneng kitesekan ku sabawalu kawawaan micidekay masakinsay, si-paw kuangangan masaulicay caykaiyadah.
S.PHON: == kakar~…ĺiman == sawawaan nu tatajna mi ¶id…ôkaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč **** sawawaan nu tatajna mi ¶id…ôkaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, i sawawaan namakaj i r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a si-paw, u saijawaj sa kar~…ĺijuńßan anu pińßa ¶…ôŇč sa, tańßkar~…ĺ ku idaŇč adada Ē~ ° ku pakańß. mir~…ĺawit tu ** waj a ¶id…ôk im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa namakaj ¶abaj ja nikasa, siim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj mar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj ¶akapińßa ¶…ôŇč, mar~…ĺa ¶id…ôkaj mar~…ĺar~…ĺid namakaj mitabaku dawmi Ē~ °aj ku udip. mukanaaj tu sapaiju Ē~ °, katuuddaj ku tatama ¶ajkukakar~…ĺid ku kapańßaj sawawaan a ¶id…ôk sa iajaan nu ¶a ¶aj tusa abatan ku mińß ¶aan kat…ôn…ôs tu tańß…ôkar~…ĺ kaadińßan sa,r~…ĺasubu% p…ôs…ônmasakin…ôs **%masa ¶a ¶aj waan amin katin…ôŇčan, mir~…ĺija u a ¶a misawantan tu u mi ¶id…ôkaj ńßaw mir~…ĺar~…ĺid. ńßp* ńßp* . ¶id…ôk a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu tatajna i tańßab sa sakat…ôpat kaijadańß, u sakas…ôpat kaijadańßan nu mapataija Ē~ ° r~…ĺasubu pisa ¶ **% u pakuju ¶ a kanatar~…ĺ, mapatajai u kapańß ńßaj a kanatar~…ĺ sa, masikur~…ĺ, sisa inai Ē~ ° ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj kiŇčkiuwan ¶i ńßaj-r~…ĺi-ja-ta r~…ĺa-k…ôs a tatajna akawawaan. im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ** kawawaan ami ¶id…ôkaj namakaj mat…ôn…ôsaj ¶u ¶uim…ôr~…ĺaŇč pabau si-pau, r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj "…ôpitńß…ôr~…ĺiar~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ djspr~…ĺasia". mar~…ĺami ¶id…ôkaj ¶a ¶aj sabautu…ôn…ôm,katir~…ĺ nu ¶u ¶u masakatir~…ĺkin…ôs sipau ¶id…ôk sabaw war~…ĺu sin mar~…ĺar~…ĺid mar~…ĺaur~…ĺi ¶ ¶id…ôkaj katin…ôŇča isij, ija sabaw …ôn…ôŇč kit…ôs…ôkan ku sabawar~…ĺu kawawaan mi ¶id…ôkaj masakinsaj, si-paw kuaŇčaŇčan masaur~…ĺi ¶aj ¶ajkaijadańß.
S.FORM: == kakaliman == sawawaan nu tatayna micidekay a imelang Ś≠źŚģģť†łÁôĆ sawawaan nu tatayna micidekay a imelang, i sawawaan namakay i la'cusay a si-paw, u saiyaway sa kaliyuhan anu pihaceng sa, tahkal ku idang adada' ku pakah. milawit tu 95 way a cidek imelang sa namakay cabay ya nikasa, siimelangay malaliday cakapihaceng, mala cidekay malalid namakay mitabaku dawmi'ay ku udip. mukanaay tu sapaiyu', katuudday ku tatama caykukakalid ku kapahay sawawaan a cidek sa iayaan nu cacay tusa abatan ku mihcaan katenes tu tahekal kaadihan sa,lasubu% pesenmasakines 10%masacacay waan amin katinengan, miliya u aca misawantan tu u micidekay haw milalid. HPV HPV . cidek a imelang nu tatayna i tahab sa sakatepat kaiyadah, u sakasepat kaiyadahan nu mapataiya' lasubu pisac 90% u pakuyuc a kanatal, mapatayai u kapah hay a kanatal sa, masikul, sisa inai' ku imelangay kingkiuwan ci Hay-li-ya-ta La-kes a tatayna akawawaan. imelang ÁóÖÁźÜ kawawaan amicidekay namakay matenesay cucuimelang pabau si-pau, la'cusay "Epithelial cell dysplasia". malamicidekay cacay sabautuenem,katil nu cucu masakatilkines sipaucidek sabaw walu sin malalid malaulic cidekay katinenga isiy, iya sabaw eneng kitesekan ku sabawalu kawawaan micidekay masakinsay, si-paw kuangangan masaulicay caykaiyadah.
S.PHON: == kakar~…ĺiman == sawawaan nu tatajna mi ¶id…ôkaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč **** sawawaan nu tatajna mi ¶id…ôkaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, i sawawaan namakaj i r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a si-paw, u saijawaj sa kar~…ĺijuńßan anu pińßa ¶…ôŇč sa, tańßkar~…ĺ ku idaŇč adada Ē~ ° ku pakańß. mir~…ĺawit tu ** waj a ¶id…ôk im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa namakaj ¶abaj ja nikasa, siim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj mar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj ¶akapińßa ¶…ôŇč, mar~…ĺa ¶id…ôkaj mar~…ĺar~…ĺid namakaj mitabaku dawmi Ē~ °aj ku udip. mukanaaj tu sapaiju Ē~ °, katuuddaj ku tatama ¶ajkukakar~…ĺid ku kapańßaj sawawaan a ¶id…ôk sa iajaan nu ¶a ¶aj tusa abatan ku mińß ¶aan kat…ôn…ôs tu tańß…ôkar~…ĺ kaadińßan sa,r~…ĺasubu% p…ôs…ônmasakin…ôs **%masa ¶a ¶aj waan amin katin…ôŇčan, mir~…ĺija u a ¶a misawantan tu u mi ¶id…ôkaj ńßaw mir~…ĺar~…ĺid. ńßp* ńßp* . ¶id…ôk a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu tatajna i tańßab sa sakat…ôpat kaijadańß, u sakas…ôpat kaijadańßan nu mapataija Ē~ ° r~…ĺasubu pisa ¶ **% u pakuju ¶ a kanatar~…ĺ, mapatajai u kapańß ńßaj a kanatar~…ĺ sa, masikur~…ĺ, sisa inai Ē~ ° ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj kiŇčkiuwan ¶i ńßaj-r~…ĺi-ja-ta r~…ĺa-k…ôs a tatajna akawawaan. im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ** kawawaan ami ¶id…ôkaj namakaj mat…ôn…ôsaj ¶u ¶uim…ôr~…ĺaŇč pabau si-pau, r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj "…ôpitńß…ôr~…ĺiar~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ djspr~…ĺasia". mar~…ĺami ¶id…ôkaj ¶a ¶aj sabautu…ôn…ôm,katir~…ĺ nu ¶u ¶u masakatir~…ĺkin…ôs sipau ¶id…ôk sabaw war~…ĺu sin mar~…ĺar~…ĺid mar~…ĺaur~…ĺi ¶ ¶id…ôkaj katin…ôŇča isij, ija sabaw …ôn…ôŇč kit…ôs…ôkan ku sabawar~…ĺu kawawaan mi ¶id…ôkaj masakinsaj, si-paw kuaŇčaŇčan masaur~…ĺi ¶aj ¶ajkaijadańß.
